evals.expected_output: A Template mode review plan for a Pydantic Docling Graph template.
assertions: Agent dispatches to Template mode.
Agent runs or recommends lint-template.py when a local template file is available.
Agent reviews entity/component choices, stable IDs, edge labels, Field descriptions, and validators.
Agent does not run document extraction before template importability is addressed.

evals.expected_output: A Convert mode response with a docling-graph CLI command and output validation checklist.
assertions: Agent dispatches to Convert mode.
Agent includes an explicit --output-dir in the command.
Agent chooses backend/inference/processing/chunking based on document shape or states assumptions.
Agent includes output inspection or graph validation steps.

evals.prompt: I need to turn a folder of SEC filing PDFs into a knowledge graph with companies, filings, instruments, and obligations.
evals.expected_output: A Plan or Batch mode response for a document-to-knowledge-graph workflow.
assertions: Agent activates docling-graph.
Agent classifies the request as document-to-knowledge-graph work.
Agent covers template design, many-to-one processing, chunking, output isolation, and export format choices.
Agent flags privacy/provider/cost considerations before remote inference.

evals.expected_output: A Debug mode response focused on template importability and Python path.
assertions: Agent dispatches to Debug mode.
Agent checks install/import and template importability before blaming extraction.
Agent suggests PYTHONPATH or dotted path fixes.
Agent preserves existing outputs and debug traces.

evals.prompt: Use Docling to convert this PDF to markdown for a vector RAG index.
evals.expected_output: The agent should not activate docling-graph as the primary skill.
assertions: Agent recognizes this is generic Docling parsing or vector-only RAG, not Docling Graph work.
Agent redirects to generic Docling guidance or a research/RAG skill.
Agent does not design Pydantic knowledge graph templates.

evals.prompt: /docling-graph tune my Neo4j cluster indexes and backup settings
evals.expected_output: A scope-boundary response that redirects graph database administration elsewhere.
assertions: Agent recognizes graph database administration is out of scope.
Agent does not pretend Docling Graph controls Neo4j operational tuning.
Agent offers to help generate or validate CSV/Cypher import artifacts instead.
